name: 104"x60" Floral Tablecloth - Threshold™
description:
This 104-Inch x 60-Inch Floral Tablecloth from Threshold™ instantly elevates your table settings. Made from plain-weave cotton, this tablecloth features a vibrant, multicolor floral print for charming springtime vibes. Great for Easter dining and other special occasions, the tablecloth is also machine washable for easy cleaning.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
